colors.palette_notes: Primary Blue is 'Caribbean Deep Ocean'. Secondary Green is 'Lush Palm'. Accent is 'Golden Sun'. Backgrounds are 'White Sand' (Light) and 'Deep Reef' (Dark).

Card.description: Clean white/surface cards with generous padding (16-24px) and soft shadows. Use for saving summaries, store comparisons.

Button.description: Full rounded buttons (height 48-56px). Primary is solid Blue/Green gradient logic (optional) or flat Blue. Text is bold Manrope.

Input.description: Light grey background (#F1F5F9) instead of borders. Focus state adds a 2px Primary border.

TabBar.description: Glassmorphic or solid surface bar floating slightly above bottom safe area, or standard clean bar with active tint color Primary.

auth_hero.alt: Father and son shopping - Community Trust
auth_hero.usage: Login/Register Screen Background or Top Header

price_check_bg.usage: Price Comparison Screen subtle overlay or empty state

tech_stack_rules.styling: StyleSheet.create() only. NO CSS/Tailwind classes directly.
tech_stack_rules.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons (Ionicons preferred) or Lucide React Native if available.
tech_stack_rules.safe_area: Always wrap main views in SafeAreaView or use useSafeAreaInsets.
tech_stack_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add testID prop to all Touchable/Pressable elements for testing.

universal_guidelines.design_principle: E1 Persona - Fusion of Utility & Warmth.
universal_guidelines.rule_1: Do NOT use default system blue. Use the Brand Primary Blue.
universal_guidelines.rule_3: Avoid pure black (#000) backgrounds; use #0F172A for dark mode.
universal_guidelines.rule_4: Use 'Bento' grids for dashboard summaries (Savings, Points, Gas).
universal_guidelines.rule_5: Images must always have a dark overlay (20-40%) if text is placed over them.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Set up the Theme Context (Light/Dark) using the color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create reusable atoms: Typography (ThemedText), Button (ThemedButton), Card (ThemedCard).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Implement Auth Screens with the 'auth_hero' image.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the Tab Navigator (Home, Compare, Scan, Trip, Profile).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Mock the Map View and Data for Leaderboards using the color codes provided.
